/usr/lib/ccache/c++    -Wnon-virtual-dtor -Wno-long-long -ansi -Wundef -Wcast-align -Wchar-subscripts -Wall -W -Wpointer-arith -Wformat-security -fno-exceptions -fno-check-new -fno-common -Woverloaded-virtual -fno-threadsafe-statics -fvisibility=hidden -fvisibility-inlines-hidden -O2 -g -DNDEBUG -DQT_NO_DEBUG  -fPIC -Wl,--enable-new-dtags  CMakeFiles/tutorial1.dir/tutorial1_automoc.o CMakeFiles/tutorial1.dir/main.o  -o tutorial1 -rdynamic -L/usr/lib/kde4/devel /usr/lib/libkdeui.so.5.3.0 /usr/lib/libkdecore.so.5.3.0 -lQtDBus -lQtCore -lpthread -lQtSvg -lQtGui -Wl,-rpath,/usr/lib/kde4/devel:::::::::::::::
